board_name: AP SCERT / Board of Secondary Education Andhra Pradesh (BSEAP)
publisher: AP SCERT / Government of Andhra Pradesh
notes: AP adopted NCERT-aligned curriculum starting 2025-26 under NEP 2020. Textbooks developed by AP SCERT, not direct NCERT reprints. Available via cse.ap.gov.in in Telugu, English, and Urdu mediums.
